name: Obscura Agent
description: Multi-backend AI agent runtime with 100+ tools, vector memory, multi-agent orchestration, and A2A protocol support.

skills.name: General Task Execution
skills.description: Execute arbitrary tasks using 100+ integrated tools including file ops, shell, web, git, finance, crypto, and more.
examples: Search the web and summarize findings
Read a file and suggest improvements
Run a shell command and return output

skills.name: Code Assistance
skills.description: Read, write, edit, and review code across any language. Runs linters, tests, and formatters.
examples: Review this Python file for issues
Write unit tests for this function
Refactor this module to use async

skills.name: Research & Analysis
skills.description: Search the web, fetch URLs, analyze data, query financial/crypto markets, and produce structured reports.
examples: Get AAPL stock data and summarize trends

skills.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
skills.description: Spawn sub-agents, delegate tasks, coordinate peer A2A agents, and aggregate results.
examples: Delegate this task to a specialist agent
Coordinate three agents to complete a workflow
Discover and invoke a peer A2A agent
